description: A system for users to register, log in, and book car rentals. It manages user accounts and rental requests.

user_roles.description: Can view login and registration pages.
Can log in, book car rentals, and view their orders.

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Allows new users to create an account in the system.
features.outputs: A new user record is created in the 'registerhere' table. User is likely redirected to login or a success page.
business_rules: Username must be unique (primary key in registerhere).
Phone number must be a valid format (validated by validate_phone_number).

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allows existing users to authenticate and access their account.
features.outputs: Upon successful login, the user's username is stored in the session and they are redirected to the rent.php page. Failed login redirects to login.php.
business_rules: Credentials (uname, pwd) must match a record in the 'registerhere' table.

features.name: Car Rental Booking
features.description: Enables logged-in users to book a car for a specified period.
features.outputs: A new rental request is created in the 'request' table. User is redirected to rent.php.
business_rules: All required fields for booking must be provided.
The system writes booking details to the 'request' table.

features.name: View My Orders
features.description: Allows logged-in users to view their past rental requests.
features.outputs: A list of the user's rental requests is displayed.
business_rules: Only authenticated users can access this page.
Orders are retrieved based on the logged-in user's session.

features.name: Logout
features.description: Allows logged-in users to end their session.
features.outputs: The user's session is destroyed, and they are redirected to the login.php page.

workflows.name: User Registration Workflow

steps.action: Fill in registration form details (first name, last name, DOB, phone, gender, email, username, password, city, state, country)

postconditions: A new user account is created in the 'registerhere' table.
User may be redirected to login or a success message.

workflows.name: User Login Workflow

steps.action: If successful, session is created and user is redirected to rent.php
If failed, user is redirected back to login.php

postconditions: On success: User is logged in, session variable 'username' is set, user is redirected to rent.php.
On failure: User remains on login.php.

workflows.name: Car Rental Booking Workflow

steps.action: Navigate to the car rental page
Select a car and enter booking details (car ID, credit card, driver's license, dates, distance, etc.)
System processes and saves the rental request
User is redirected back to the rent.php page

postconditions: A new record is created in the 'request' table.
User is on the rent.php page.

workflows.name: View Orders Workflow

steps.action: System retrieves and displays the user's rental requests from the 'request' table

postconditions: User sees a list of their past rental requests.

workflows.name: Logout Workflow

steps.action: User is redirected to the login page

postconditions: User is on the login.php page.
